scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @prospectinbound/api" "npm run dev -w @prospectinbound/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @prospectinbound/shared && npm run build -w @prospectinbound/web && npm run build -w @prospectinbound/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @prospectinbound/shared && npm run typecheck -w @prospectinbound/api && npm run typecheck -w @prospectinbound/web
scripts.test: npm run db:migrate && npm run build -w @prospectinbound/shared && vitest run
